rule_text: Bidders apprehensive of physical tender-box submission may send their tender by POST with EMD reaching one day prior to bid-receipt close date — and may participate in person at tender opening; tender authority must accept such postal submissions to prevent cartel intimidation.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VIII Section 6 (Cartel Prevention)
verification_method: Check tender NIT explicitly permits postal submission with day-prior cut-off; reject NITs that bar postal submission

rule_text: AP Commissioner of Tenders must finalise grading modalities for AP contractors within 60 days of GO 94/2003; contractor grading must be UPDATED EVERY YEAR on 1st June.
verification_method: Check bidder's grading certificate is current (issued/refreshed in latest 1-June cycle); flag stale grading > 1 year

rule_text: GO 94/2003 (R&B amendment) RAISES the Chief Engineer / Engineer-in-Chief tender-finalisation power from Rs.100 lakh (Rs.1 cr, original) to Rs.200 lakh (Rs.2 cr) due to cost escalation; National Highways works retain their separate orders.
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND Sector!=NationalHighways
verification_method: For AP non-NH works: CE/ENC may finalise tenders up to Rs.2 cr; works > Rs.2 cr → COT route (per AP-GO-055)
